Docs.summary: Main entry point to use MIDI in MacOS X and iOS.

remarks.para: The MidiClient class is your gateway to communicate with the MIDI subsystem on MacOS and iOS.

You typically will create an instance of MidiClient with a name that identifies this particular client, connect to the various events that are exposed to this class and create both input and output midi ports using the methods.
The following events will be raised on your MidiClient instance: , , , , , and
